final:
// // This module implements an 8-bit shift register with parallel load capability and a shift control. The shift register shifts right if the shift control is 1, and shifts left if the shift control is 0. If the load signal is high, the input data should be loaded into the register.
module shift_register(
    input           clk,
    input           reset,
    input           load,
    input           shift_ctrl,
    input   [7:0]   data_in,

    output reg [7:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset)
begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end else begin
        if (shift_ctrl) begin
            data_out <= data_out << 1;
        end else begin
            data_out <= data_out >> 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule

The shift register shifts right if the shift control is 1, and shifts left if the shift control is 0. If the load signal is high, the input data should be loaded into the register.
